PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-16-2008 Continued To Apr-30-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Conrad for the Petitioner.

Mr. Conrad stated that he did a search online and found many parties with the name of Daniel Miller residing in New York city. Furthermore, he stated that he contacted the decedent's sister in Florida and that she did not know the half brothers date of birth, social security number, or address and that he had made every reasonable effort to locate him. The Court directed Mr. Conrad to inquire about Mr. Miller's middle initial and conduct a search in Manhattan. Mr. Conrad is to file the second supplemental declaration indicating further efforts made to contact Mr. Miller. The matter was continued to April 30, 2008.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy J. Garrido.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-02-2008 Continued To Apr-16-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
